# Veles Voyage — Modern Travel Encyclopedia
A high-performance, premium travel platform built with Next.js 14 and MDX.

## Context
Primary goal: Providing expert travel guides (217+ countries) with rich interactivity, Web3 features, and PWA support.
Target Audience: Russian-speaking travelers seeking expert advice for 2026.

## Technology Stack
- **Core**: Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, React 18.
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion (animations), PostCSS.
- **Content**: MDX (`next-mdx-remote`) stored in `src/content/countries/`.
- **Maps**: Mapbox GL, Leaflet, Google Maps JS API.
- **Web3**: TON, WalletConnect (Wagmi/RainbowKit).
- **Monitoring**: Sentry, Vercel Analytics.
- **Testing**: Jest, Playwright (E2E).

## SEO Architecture
The project has a multi-layered SEO system targeting Google, Yandex, Bing, voice assistants (Alisa, Google Assistant), and LLM crawlers (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity).

### SEO Files
- `src/lib/seo/unifiedSEO.ts`: Core SEO library. Contains all schema generators and the `SEO_CONFIG` object.
- `src/lib/seo/universalSEO.ts`: Async metadata/schema generators used by route pages. Exports `generateUniversalMetadata()` and `generateUniversalSchemas()`.
- `src/shared/utils/generateCountrySEOMetadata.ts`: Country-specific metadata generator.
- `src/shared/constants/seo.ts`: Single source of truth for site URL, logos, contacts, socials, verifications.
- `src/app/robots.ts`: Robots.txt configuration.
- `src/app/sitemap.ts`: Root sitemap combining wiki, cities, video, news, and visual sitemaps.

### JSON-LD Schemas Generated Per Country Page
1. **Article** – headline, author, publisher, datePublished, dateModified.
2. **TouristDestination** – name, geo coordinates, keywords, touristType.
3. **BreadcrumbList** – Home > Энциклопедия > Country Name.
4. **FAQPage** – parsed from MDX frontmatter `faqs` field (format: `Question|Answer;;Question|Answer`).

### Metadata Features
- Open Graph (og:title, og:description, og:image 1200×630).
- Twitter Card (`summary_large_image`).
- VK meta tags (`vk:image`).
- Geo meta tags (`geo.position`, `geo.placename`, `ICBM`) for location-based pages.
- AI/LLM hints: `ai:indexable=true`, `llm:crawlable=true`.
- Voice search hints: `speakable:cssSelector`, `voice:speakable=true`.
- Yandex Zen article tags: `zen:article:name`, `zen:article:description`.
- Canonical + hreflang (`ru`, `ru-RU`, `x-default`).

### MDX Frontmatter SEO Fields (Required for Country Pages)
```yaml
title: "Country Year — Description | Велес Вояж"
description: "160-char description"
keywords: "keyword1, keyword2, ..."    # comma-separated string
image: "https://veles-voyage.ru/images/countries/<slug>.jpg"
datePublished: dynamic
dateModified: dynamic
author: "Велес Вояж | Экспертная редакция"
latitude: 0.0
longitude: 0.0
capital: "Capital City"
continent: europe|asia|africa|...
faqs: "Question1|Answer1;;Question2|Answer2"  # generates FAQPage schema
```

## Key Directory Structure
- `/src/app/`: Next.js routes and server components.
- `/src/components/`: UI components (including `/mdx/` components).
- `/src/content/`: MDX data files (guides, wiki).
- `/src/shared/`: Cross-cutting utilities, types, hooks, and static data.
- `/src/features/`: Complex domain-specific features.
- `/public/`: Static assets (images, icons).

## Path Aliases
- `@/*` -> `./src/*`
- `@components/*` -> `./src/components/*`
- `@lib/*` -> `./src/lib/*`
- `@shared/*` -> `./src/shared/*`
- `@app/*` -> `./src/app/*`
- `@hooks/*` -> `./src/hooks/*`
- `@types/*` -> `./src/types/*`
- `@styles/*` -> `./src/*` (actually typo in tsconfig, it points to `./src/styles/*`)

## MDX Component Reference
Use these components within MDX files to maintain design consistency:
- `<WikiHero title="..." subtitle="..." src="..." alt="..." />`: Main hero section.
- `<SocialLinks />`: Sharing & social buttons.
- `<InfoBlock type="info|tip|warning|success" title="...">...</InfoBlock>`: Colored callouts.
- `<FeatureGrid columns={1|2|3}>...</FeatureGrid>`: Layout for features.
- `<FeatureItem icon="..." title="...">...</FeatureItem>`: Individual feature card.
- `<PriceList title="..." icon="...">...</PriceList>`: Container for pricing.
- `<PriceItem icon="..." label="..." price="..." />`: Pricing entry.
- `<StepList>...</StepList>` & `<StepItem number="..." title="...">...</StepItem>`: Vertical process steps.
- `<MdxImage src="..." alt="..." caption="..." />`: Image with stylized caption.
- `<InteractiveMap title="..." locations={[{ id, name, type, coordinates }]} />`: Map with markers.

## Coding Standards
1. **Server First**: Prefer Server Components. Use `'use client'` sparingly at the component leaf nodes.
2. **Visual Aesthetics**: Adhere to the "Premium Design" system (gradients, rounded-xl/2xl, glassmorphism).
3. **SEO**: Every MDX file must have a comprehensive frontmatter (title, description, keywords, schema data).
4. **Localization**: Primary language is Russian (`ru-RU`). Content is optimized for the year 2026.
5. **Types**: Strict TypeScript usage. Avoid `any`. Use paths from `@shared/types`.

## Critical Files
- `package.json`: Dependencies and build scripts.
- `tailwind.config.js`: Custom theme tokens (colors: primary, secondary, accent).
- `next.config.js`: Next.js configuration and image remote patterns.
- `src/middleware.ts`: Request handling/protection.

## Common Tasks
- **Start Dev**: `npm run dev`
- **Clean & Rebuild**: `npm run fresh`
- **Type Check**: `npm run type-check`
- **Build**: `npm run build`
